packageRules.description: Keep GitHub Actions, Docker, and k8s image refs pinned to digests so the OpenSSF Scorecard pinned-dependencies check stays satisfied. The digest-maintenance PRs this produces are batched into the weekly group below, so pinning costs no extra PR noise.
Collapse every non-major update (minor, patch, digest, pin) into ONE weekly batched PR so the PR volume stays low. Majors and security alerts are handled separately below.
Major updates stay individual and manually reviewed (no automerge), and are not delayed to the weekly window.
Hold TypeScript at 5.x in the verifier. TS 6.0 needs tsconfig and source migrations we have not scoped.
Hold jsonschema at 0.18.x in the Rust verifier. 0.19+ renames JSONSchema to Validator and changes the compile/validate API, needs manual migration.
